content: agent1: implementing normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (refactor image_to_base64). Will touch only that file.

agent1: FYI our working dirs seem isolated — my copy of types.py doesn't show your get_image_mimetype edits, only the pristine original. I've added a module-level normalize_image_bytes(image)->(encoded,decoded_for_guessing) helper and refactored image_to_base64 to use it, keeping filetype.guess inline in image_to_base64 (no separate get_image_mimetype method on my end). Writing patch.txt now with just this change.
